ops.text: capt-hook 10.x's plugin-pack auto-discovery (resolve_plugin_packs) pulls hooks from $CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR into `capt-hook --root X --hooks <dir> test` even when --root/--hooks are explicitly scoped elsewhere: running cc-guides' CI test command locally executed 732 tests from 8 unrelated installed plugins (2 of them failing on machine-local state in ~/.getaway), versus the 9 tests the same command runs on a clean environment. Cost us a triage round-trip chasing phantom "pre-existing test failures" that CI could never see. Scoped flags should scope discovery too — or a --no-plugin-discovery flag; worth filing upstream against capt-hook.
